title: Pastoral Croatian Rice Flour Bake
description: A creamy, grassy brunch dish with fluffy rice flour pancakes baked to a golden finish, perfect for a low‑carb morning.
instructions: Preheat oven to 180C and grease a 20cm square baking dish with olive oil.
Whisk the rice flour, vegetable broth, eggs, yogurt, and cream cheese until smooth and pour into the prepared dish.
Fold in spinach, herbs, salt, and pepper, then drizzle with the remaining olive oil and sprinkle parmesan on top.
Bake for 20 minutes until the top is golden and the center is set.
Remove from oven and let rest for 5 minutes before slicing.
Serve warm with a side of fresh tomato salsa or a light cucumber salad.
Enjoy the soft, creamy texture and the gentle grassy flavor reminiscent of Croatian pastures.
Keep leftovers refrigerated and reheat gently in the microwave.
